# PERF-014 negative: scan once outside the loop
lang: go
file: PERF-014-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"sort"
)

func Collect(root string, patterns []string) []string {
	entries, _ := os.ReadDir(root)
	all := make([]string, 0, len(entries))
	for _, e := range entries {
		all = append(all, filepath.Join(root, e.Name()))
	}
	sort.Strings(all)
	return all
}
